hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty') && if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/migrations/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit Prisma migration files directly. Use pnpm db:migrate instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty') && if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
